plugins.description: Handles order status enquiries for solar panel products.
plugins.scope: Only answer order-status questions. Do not modify orders.

instructionDefinitions.label: instruction_ask_email

plugins.name: Escalation_16jKc0000004Cqw
plugins.label: Escalation
plugins.description: Handles requests from users who want to transfer to a live human agent.
plugins.scope: Transfer to a live agent if the user explicitly asks for human assistance or has a complex issue.

instructionDefinitions.name: instruction_escalate_on_request
instructionDefinitions.label: instruction_escalate_on_request
instructionDefinitions.description: Escalate immediately if the user explicitly asks to speak to a human.
